last_task.subject: UI on 4000 still has broken images for Bitcoin Faces. We get them from the bitcoinfaces.xyz/api/get-image?name=STRING endpoint in SVG format. We can convert that to PNG with ImageMagick. If we don't have IM installed you can install it you have sudo paswordless access on the VM. Otherwise just load SVG correctly in the HTML so it shows on Live Feed and Agents tab (big part of presentation!).
